notes.answer: Atul does not share salary expectations publicly via the chatbot. For compensation discussions, please reach out directly at atulsharma8790@gmail.com or schedule a call at https://calendly.com/a2l/30min
Atul is currently open to opportunities and available for conversations. For specific availability timelines, please connect directly via email at atulsharma8790@gmail.com
Atul is based in Gurugram, India and is open to remote, hybrid, or relocation opportunities depending on the role. Please reach out directly to discuss specifics.

Atul has built 9 AI-powered tools as part of his personal brand portfolio: (1) QA Test Case Generator — BDD test cases from user stories; (2) QA Candidate Analyzer — 360° resume evaluation for QA roles; (3) AI SDLC Orchestrator — full SDLC plan generation phase by phase; (4) SDLC Metrics Generator — sprint data to exec-ready quality metrics; (5) Incident Post-Mortem Generator — blameless RCA with action items; (6) Sprint Retro Analyzer — retro feedback to themes and health scores; (7) PRD Generator — product idea to full PRD document; (8) AI Performance Test Planner — app description to k6 + JMeter test plan; (9) Test Automation Skeleton Generator — stack description to production-ready framework scaffold with GitHub/GitLab push. Two more are in progress: QuizMenti (Mentimeter-style quiz platform) and AuctionDraft (IPL-style team auction platform).

Outside of work, Atul enjoys cricket, technology podcasts, exploring AI research papers, and mentoring upcoming QA engineers. He is passionate about building products that solve real engineering problems.
